title: Organisation of the farm advisory system in France
description: An analysis of French farm advisory regimes based on case studies of chickpea introduction in Gers and labour organisation in Pyrénées-Atlantiques reveals a segmented advisory landscape dominated by cooperatives, CERFrance, and chambers of agriculture. The abstract highlights how advisory services are strategically provided alongside inputs, outputs, or other services, and notes the limited impact of alternative farmer-based associations.
